pitch_rationale: Area-weighted across 9 roof segments from Google Solar API (imageryQuality=HIGH): 36.01° → 9:12. Solar's underlying DSM model reports ~5° MAE in published benchmarks (Satellite Sunroof, NeurIPS 2024).
footprint_rationale: Subject is one unit in a row of attached townhome-style units, each with a simple 4-way hip roof. The orange bounding box spans ~195 px (E–W) × ~263 px (N–S); the roof itself occupies ~195 px wide × ~225 px tall (the bottom ~35 px of the box is yard/landscaping). Converting at 0.1879 ft/px gives a roof bounding rectangle of ~36.6 ft × 42.3 ft ≈ 1,548 sq ft. Hip roofs fill their full plan-view rectangle, so after minor edge adjustments I report ~1,500 sq ft. The ridge runs N–S and equals L − W = 5.7 ft (~6 ft), consistent with the near-square proportions creating a near-pyramid shape. Four equal hips each measure (W/2)×√2 ≈ 25.9 ft in plan view for a total of ~104 ft. All four perimeter edges are eaves totaling ~158 ft. No valleys or rake edges are present on this pure hip roof. Confidence is moderate (0.50) due to partial tree shadow over the roof and difficulty precisely locating eave edges at the shared party walls.

condition.rationale: The subject home within the orange bounding box is a multi-gabled townhome-style unit with a dark charcoal/gray asphalt shingle roof. Across all visible roof planes — the main north-facing slope, the central ridge area, and the smaller gable sections — the shingle color is uniform and consistent with no distinct discoloration patches, color mismatches, or staining tracks visible. The ridge lines appear geometrically straight with no visible sag or deviation compared to the neighboring identical units on either side. No tarps, foreign debris, or large missing material sections are detectable. There is partial tree canopy encroachment along the south/southeast lower edge of the bounding box, which slightly limits assessment of that lower eave zone; however, the area visible there shows no anomalies. All visible roof surfaces compare favorably in texture and color to the immediately adjacent units, which appear to be the same age and construction, supporting a no-issue determination. No findings met the confidence threshold for inclusion.
